---
title: "Document Intelligence Workshop @ KDD 2022: Program Announced"
description: "DI-2022 program announced — see you in DC."
author: "synesis"
date: "2022-07-22"
categories: [NLP, NLU, conference]
image: cover.jpg
---

![DI-2022 @ KDD 2022 program. Image from [DI workshop](https://document-intelligence.github.io/DI-2022/).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Announcing the program of the 3rd Document Intelligence Workshop @ KDD2022 (DI-2022)!

* DI-2022 Program: <https://document-intelligence.github.io/DI-2022/program/>
* DI-2022 website: <https://document-intelligence.github.io/DI-2022/>

* Program Committee Chair: Ani Nenkova (Adobe)
* Organizing committee: Doug Burdick (IBM Research), Benjamin Han (Microsoft), Dave Lewis (Redgrave Data), Sandeep Tata (Google), and Dan Tecuci (EY).

* Previous year (DI-2021): <https://document-intelligence.github.io/DI-2021/>


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_kdd2022-documentintelligence-nlp-activity-6956490196494290944-Sr_q).*
